description: Create a new Activity log in farmOS Field Kit for a mushroom inoculation event dated February 14, 2025. The log must include the notes: "Inoculated red oak logs with Shiitake strain LE-46. Used sawdust spawn with thumb-style brass inoculator. Sealed with cheese wax. Logs stacked in crib formation under the pine canopy for the spawn run." Record two quantities: 50 "logs inoculated" with the unit "count", and 5.5 "sawdust spawn used" with the unit "lbs".
